name: mab-agent-skills
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins — skills, agents, and recipes I want to carry between environments.

plugins.name: mab-harness
plugins.description: Plan → implement → evaluate loop with a skeptical subagent gate, plan JSON state, and research-backed practices. Supports both dev and design work.

plugins.name: life-goals
plugins.description: A living goal system: north star values → time-horizon cascade (30yr→90-day) → atomic habits. Six life domains: health, financial, family, career, growth, legacy.

plugins.name: se-leader
plugins.description: SE leader work planning: quarterly quota decomposition, SE-driven pipeline generation, team development (1:1s + Obsidian integration), market intelligence.
